texts.label: text
texts.orig: Plate and frame are the simplest low packing density (100-400 m 2 /m 3 )
texts.text: Plate and frame are the simplest low packing density (100-400 m 2 /m 3 )

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Spiral Wound is much used; Packing density: 300 -1000m 2 /m 3
texts.text:  Spiral Wound is much used; Packing density: 300 -1000m 2 /m 3

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Hollow Fibers are preferred for large membrane areas Packing density: → 30 000 m 2 /m 3
texts.text:  Hollow Fibers are preferred for large membrane areas Packing density: → 30 000 m 2 /m 3

texts.text: Analytics: T, P, RH, flow, composition

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Challenges in a membrane system for flue gas
texts.text: Challenges in a membrane system for flue gas

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · high energy efficiency: no phase change is required to achieve separation
texts.text: high energy efficiency: no phase change is required to achieve separation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · modularity: scalable construction and operation, high flexibility
texts.text: modularity: scalable construction and operation, high flexibility

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · green character: neither chemicals nor regeneration steps required
texts.text: green character: neither chemicals nor regeneration steps required

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · reliability: no moving parts in the core technology (only in supporting compressors/pumps)
texts.text: reliability: no moving parts in the core technology (only in supporting compressors/pumps)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · small footprint: compact installations instead of e.g. large/tall towers
texts.text: small footprint: compact installations instead of e.g. large/tall towers

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Long term testing from mid-May till mid-September (3 periods: 24 membranes, 8 membranes, 16 membranes)
texts.text: Long term testing from mid-May till mid-September (3 periods: 24 membranes, 8 membranes, 16 membranes)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Key results : 6-months operation, durability sufficient, performance lower than expected, system robustness needs improvement
texts.text: Key results : 6-months operation, durability sufficient, performance lower than expected, system robustness needs improvement

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Tens of cases modelled with modelling tool suite
texts.text: Tens of cases modelled with modelling tool suite

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Parameters varied: membrane type and area, pressures, power consumption, …
texts.text: Parameters varied: membrane type and area, pressures, power consumption, …

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 2 realistic cases selected for further economic modelling: 2- stage PPO - FSC, vacuum driving force, 70 & 85% recovery
texts.text: 2 realistic cases selected for further economic modelling: 2- stage PPO - FSC, vacuum driving force, 70 & 85% recovery

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · NOTE: membrane performance based on test rig measurements; much higher performance under better conditions
texts.text: NOTE: membrane performance based on test rig measurements; much higher performance under better conditions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ❑ Power consumption constitutes 70% of the OPEX (0.1 €/kWh), if electricity price goes down to 0.05 €/kWh (realistic in Norway), CO 2 capture cost: 27 €/t
texts.text: ❑ Power consumption constitutes 70% of the OPEX (0.1 €/kWh), if electricity price goes down to 0.05 €/kWh (realistic in Norway), CO 2 capture cost: 27 €/t

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ❑ CAPEX and OPEX depend on cost model and electricity price
texts.text: ❑ CAPEX and OPEX depend on cost model and electricity price

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ❑ Process can be further optimized related to pressure ratio and integration of compression heat (He et al.)
texts.text: ❑ Process can be further optimized related to pressure ratio and integration of compression heat (He et al.)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Test results : operating issues resolvable, performance lower than  expected most likely due to system design, membrane core technology proved functional
texts.text: Test results : operating issues resolvable, performance lower than  expected most likely due to system design, membrane core technology proved functional

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Modelling results : power consumption and space usage acceptable
texts.text: Modelling results : power consumption and space usage acceptable

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Benchmarking input : positive (cost, HSE, flexibility); no showstoppers
texts.text: Benchmarking input : positive (cost, HSE, flexibility); no showstoppers

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Reference results : good to excellent industrial performance and durability
texts.text: Reference results : good to excellent industrial performance and durability

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Similar technologies : perspective for improvement, commercial operation
texts.text: Similar technologies : perspective for improvement, commercial operation

texts.text: From Plate-and-Frame module to hollow fiber (HF) module

texts.text: Design two-stage membrane system (achieve high CO 2 purity and recovery) using commercial modules

texts.text: o test out different configurations: in series / parallel

texts.text: Higher performance, (semi-) commercial hollow fiber modules and test rig, long term stable operation, power consumption

table_cells.text: Low feed pressure, need high vacuum or feed compression to get high flux
Impurities in feed, SOx, NOx, particles
Maintain high RH in gas stream
Heating /insulation of system to avoid water condensation
Good flow pattern depends on module design

grid.text: Low feed pressure, need high vacuum or feed compression to get high flux
Impurities in feed, SOx, NOx, particles
Maintain high RH in gas stream
Heating /insulation of system to avoid water condensation
Good flow pattern depends on module design
